en: order for the file Danny I'm here to help in any way I can thank you you.

en: believe that don't you Danny that I'm here to help you in any way I can of.

en: course corporal take you by personnel on your way out to the flight line and you.

en: can have all the transfer orders that you want you have to ask me nicely I beg.

ja: 丁寧に頼めと言ったんだ。いいか、ダニー。弾丸や爆弾や血には耐えられる。
